ambient_spatial_hero_enabled.description: Amen Living Hero System master gate. Emergency rollback: false.

living_editorial_banner_enabled.description: Enables Living Editorial Banner presentation. Requires ambient_spatial_hero_enabled.

spatial_hero_reduce_motion_fallback_enab.description: Always keep true. Forces static fallback paths for accessibility and low-power conditions.

daily_verse_living_hero_enabled.description: Pilot surface: Daily Verse Living mode. Classic remains available.

daily_digest_living_hero_enabled.description: Pilot surface: Amen Daily Digest context.

discover_living_hero_enabled.description: Pilot surface: Amen Discover. Hidden during active search.

selah_living_hero_enabled.description: Pilot surface: Selah read tab only.

church_profile_living_hero_enabled.description: First-wave beta surface: Church Profile and Church Discovery.

live_event_living_hero_enabled.description: First-wave beta surface: Live Events and Worship Experiences.

creator_kit_living_hero_enabled.description: Pilot surface: Amen Creator Kit Home.

version.description: Amen Living Hero System rollout template. Defaults fail closed; enable by condition.
